business.name: Canyon Wheelworks
business.summary: A neighborhood bicycle repair shop offering commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and careful maintenance with walk in service welcome.

offerings.name: Commuter tune ups
offerings.description: Routine attention to help everyday bicycles ride smoothly and reliably.

offerings.name: Flat fixes
offerings.description: Walk in help for flat tires and related tire issues.

offerings.name: Careful maintenance
offerings.description: Thoughtful upkeep for bicycles that need regular service.

brand.voice: Direct, helpful, and grounded in everyday cycling.
brand.aesthetic: A warm desert workshop look with sun faded paper tones, dark ink, simple bicycle diagrams, and subtle references to Tucson terrain.

signatureMove.name: Rolling Service Wheel
signatureMove.description: A simple illustrated bicycle wheel turns gently as visitors move through the service list, while every service remains visible as regular page content.
signatureMove.touchFallback: On touch screens, the complete service list stays visible and the wheel appears as a static illustration.
signatureMove.reducedMotion: When reduced motion is enabled, the wheel remains still and all content stays visible.

content.headline: Careful bike repair for everyday Tucson rides
content.subheadline: Bring your bike in for commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and thoughtful maintenance. Walk ins are welcome.
content.about: Canyon Wheelworks is a neighborhood shop focused on keeping everyday bicycles in good working order. The approach is practical, careful, and suited to riders who depend on their bikes.
content.contactPrompt: Walk in with your bike or contact the shop once current details are available.

confirmed.label: Owner details
confirmed.value: A neighborhood bicycle repair shop focused on commuter tune ups, flat fixes, and careful maintenance. Walk in service is welcome.
